series_metadata.series_description: Pre-complaint discovery materials (compulsary process materials) received in response to an investigative demand subpoena issued by the Ohio Attorney General''s Office to anyone with potential information relevant to an antitrust investigation (ORC 1331.16)

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Shorter of from date when material was made available or when materials are no longer required use in a pending proceeding; or such other period as consented by producing party or ordered by an Ohio Court of Common Pleas ; Electronic: Shorter of from date when material was made available or when materials are no longer required use in a pending proceeding; or such other period as consented by producing party or ordered by an Ohio Court of Common Pleas
